name: aif-ext-implementation-notes
description: Append-only decision journal for /aif-implement. Records decisions, deviations, tradeoffs, surprises and open questions made during implementation (markdown canon + auto-generated HTML view), feeds them into /aif-commit bodies, and checks coverage in /aif-verify.

commands.name: notes
commands.description: Manage the implementation-notes journal (render HTML, show paths, check coverage)
